Details: Based on one study, inactivation of Cryptosporidium in water by permanganate addition is not effective. Log inactivation levels of 0.21 to 0.27 were seen with a CT of 2,400 mg x min/L which corresponds either to a very high permanganate dose or an extensive contact time. Permanganate is not in the LT2 micobial tool box for Cryptosporidium control.
